expectedClassifications.notes: [fragile] Single consumer edge (barrel index.ts). NOT actually dead -- consumer.ts imports through barrel. Interpreter flags single-consumer exports as DEAD_EXPORT(low). COLORS and Colors have 2 consumers (sibling + barrel) so are correctly not flagged.

notes: Boundary case: fragile export detection in barrel chain. extendColorsSet has only 1 direct consumer edge (barrel) despite being consumed transitively by consumer.ts. The interpreter counts direct edge consumers, not transitive consumers. COLORS/Colors have 2 direct consumers each (sibling + barrel) so are stable.
